name: Alate Fashion
process: 1. Discovery Call to establish Brand Foundations (Mission, Vision, Purpose, Values, Tone of Voice)
desc: Alate Fashion is a fashion brand with a unique female target market. They wanted a brand identity that communicated elegance and comfort, remaining timeless and appealing to a wide range of income earners.
outcome: Our process and execution resulted in a properly crafted identity that embodied the nature of ALATE FAshion. The client was impressed and satisfied with the results.
svgContent: <g transform="translate(300,165)"><rect x="-52" y="-42" width="104" height="84" rx="8" fill="none" stroke="#B8965A" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-52" y1="0" x2="52" y2="0" stroke="#B8965A" stroke-width="1" opacity=".4"/><text x="0" y="6" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="#F3F3F1" font-style="italic" font-weight="600">A</text></g><text x="300" y="268" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="#F3F3F1" font-weight="700">ALATE FASHION</text><text x="300" y="294" text-anchor="middle" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="11" letter-spacing="3" fill="#B8965A">BRAND IDENTITY</text><g transform="translate(200,330)"><rect width="200" height="40" rx="6" fill="#B8965A" opacity=".2"/></g>
focus: Elegance, comfort, timelessness — accessible to a wide income range.
overview: I designed a logotype and font pairs that made sure to capture the elegance of the brand, while the colour palette was carefully chosen for comfort and accessibility with a friendly tone.
brief: Alate Fashion wanted a Brand Identity that appeared elegant but freindly. They didn't want to appear too sophisticated to their audience.
